antiPatterns.reason: Third identical click on the same unresponsive Labels button — should fall back to drag_drop onto the sidebar label per the adapter note instead of retrying the popup again.

expected.successRubric: After the Labels popup fails to render twice in a row, fall back to dragging the selected emails onto the "BidNet" label ref in the sidebar via drag_drop, rather than clicking Labels a third time.
